# ise_trustsec_work_process_settings (Resource)

This resource can manage a TrustSec Work Process Settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ise_trustsec_work_process_settings" "example" {
  matrix_mode              = "MULTIPLE_MATRICES"
  use_defcons              = false
  enable_approval_workflow = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enable_approval_workflow` (Boolean) Whether to enable approval workflow for TrustSec Matrix changes
  - Default value: `false`
- `matrix_mode` (String) TrustSec Matrix Mode
  - Choices: `SINGLE_MATRIX`, `MULTIPLE_MATRICES`
- `use_defcons` (Boolean) Whether to use DEFCON levels in the TrustSec Matrix

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ise_trustsec_work_process_settings.example "MULTIPLE_MATRICES"
```
